# MEOK Launch — 4 July 2026, the Black Swan

> 4 weeks before the EU AI Act Article 50 cliff. The 32-server MCP compliance fleet goes from beta to production. 100% EU AI Act + UK AI Bill compliance. Sovereign UK infrastructure. 100% Nick.

## Event details

- **Date:** 4 July 2026, 09:00-18:00 BST
- **Format:** Virtual (https://meok.ai/launch)
- **Cost:** Free, register at https://meok.ai/launch
- **First 100 registrants:** 50% off Pro £199/mo for 1 year

## Agenda

- 09:00 Welcome + sovereign UK state of the union (Nick Templeman)
- 09:30 Keystone demo — sign + verify live
- 10:30 32-server MCP fleet tour
- 12:00 Lunch + partner lounge (30% rev share for GRC partners)
- 13:30 8 industry verticals walkthrough
- 15:00 Article 50 Kit + Watchdog Cert launch
- 16:00 Partner program (30% rev share)
- 17:00 Live Q&A with SOV3 hive
- 18:00 Closing — cliff is 29 days out

## Numbers (live from SOV3 hub)

- 189 SOV3 agents
- 32 MCP servers in the compliance fleet
- 17 keystone endpoints
- 100% EU AI Act 43/43 (MEOK Sovereign OS)
- 100% UK AI Bill 0 gaps
- NIS2 OUT_OF_SCOPE
- 4-day audit turnaround
- £4,950 audit price (vs £40-80K Big-4)

## Pricing

- Pro: £199/mo — 1,000 calls/day, signed Ed25519 receipts
- Enterprise: £1,499/mo — multi-tenant, co-branded
- 48h Assessment: £5,000 one-time
- Article 50 Kit: £999 one-time
- Watchdog Cert: £4,950 one-time
